title: Evangelion Series in NME
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Evangelion Series in NME             Quote Post by Darkwing » Sun Dec 23, 2012 9:50 pm Okay so as of 3.0 we are up to 13 Eva's. However several are missing. So where are these missing Evangelions? Lets review through the Eva series. Unit-00- Destroyed, eaten by Zuriel. Unit-01- Awakened, currently used to power the Wunder by Wille. Unit-02- Seriously damaged by self destruct. Will be used to make Eva 8+2. Unit-03- Possessed by Badiel. Destroyed by Unit-01 under dummy plug control. Unit-04- Vanished along with Nevada base during S2 Engine test. Unit-05- Destroyed, possibly sabatoge to self destruct. Mark-06- Possessed by 12th angel, absorbed by Unit-13. Unit-07- missing. Unit-08- Heavy damage. Will be used to make Unit 8+2. Mark-09- Turned into psuedo evolved form, destroyed by Unit-02's self destruct. Unit-10- Missing Unit-11- Missing Unit-12- Missing Unit-13- Awakened, abandoned but apparently still intact. So we have four missing Evangelions. It seems like Khara decided to go right to 13, maybe because it was the unlucky number? So if Unit-07 shows up it'll be lucky and good things will happen? But what happened to these Evas? Did they get destroyed during the time skip? Never finished? Or will we be seeing them at some point?

[]: Re: (Spoileres) The M_______ E___             Quote Post by Alpha » Sun Dec 23, 2012 9:53 pm Darkwing wrote: Mark-06- Possessed by 12th angel, absorbed by Unit-13.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Dec 23, 2012 10:03 pm when it seemed like EVA 07 was the mysterious missing number, it showing up still seemed pretty likely, but now, I don't think we'll see the missing EVAs - they obviously skipped ahead for the sake, of well, thirteen , and probably to accentuate the time skip as well. EVAs were built and destroyed, Rei clones came and went, two more angels came (the 11 never appearing at all), and Shinji missed it all. It's like you fall into a coma when most phones weren't wireless yet, and when you wake up, everybody you know owns an iPhone.

[]: Re: (Spoileres) The M_______ E___             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 23, 2012 10:26 pm Alpha wrote: Wait, Dai-Juusangouki absorbed Mark.06, too? I thought it only absorbed the Angel, and left the Eva headless, but otherwise untouched.

[]: Re: (Spoileres) The M_______ E___             Quote Post by Darkwing » Sun Dec 23, 2012 10:34 pm Alpha wrote: Wait, Dai-Juusangouki absorbed Mark.06, too? I thought it only absorbed the Angel, and left the Eva headless, but otherwise untouched.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Dec 23, 2012 10:54 pm Yeah, WILLE isn't big on ressources, all they have is stolen and patched together. So those missing EVAs were probably NERV or SEELE-affilated, and one can assume that Misato & co destroyed them offscreen. (Misato: "We're gonna destroy all of NERV's EVAs!")

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Mon Dec 24, 2012 8:41 am I would have to assume that up until this point Wille has been at least somewhat clandestine about it's anti- Nerv operations. They have the cover story of wanting to restore the earths oceans. I can't imagine that it would fool Gendo, so clearly it's not to decieve them. It's one of the things to me that implies there has to be someone other than Wille and Nerv left. And that cover is blown the moment they get caught smashing up Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Tue Dec 25, 2012 2:19 am Darkwing wrote: I would have to assume that up until this point Wille has been at least somewhat clandestine about it's anti- Nerv operations. They have the cover story of wanting to restore the earths oceans. I can't imagine that it would fool Gendo, so clearly it's not to decieve them. It's one of the things to me that implies there has to be someone other than Wille and Nerv left. And that cover is blown the moment they get caught smashing up Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Dec 25, 2012 3:14 pm In any case, it would really help if we knew just how much is left. NERV HQ should be in one of the less hospitable regions, having been the epicenter... Where exactly does the coverstory appear/where's it from? The booklet? In the translated script so far, they're only introduced to Shinji as a "Anti-Nerv-Organisation"...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Dec 26, 2012 3:45 am Reichu wrote: Eva-08 doesn't actually seem that damaged. The arms got seared from contact with Eva-13, and the unit sustained a fall, but seems pretty whole overall.

[]:             Quote Post by Alpha » Wed Dec 26, 2012 4:20 am Actually, if you look closely, both of Eva-08 arms are folded in front of its chest, covered in bandages. You can see the hands emerging at the sides. It seems unlikely that it lost them, although they could just be packed together with it, I guess. Also, am I the only one that sees Eva-02 and its reminded of its mangled corpse from EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Dec 26, 2012 4:31 am You're right, it was just my poor eyesight combined with the lack of details then.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Jan 13, 2013 6:53 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Sun Jan 13, 2013 6:58 pm Please explain the pictures to me, all i see are cigar shaped tubes. But to answer the OP, look how many evas are in the ground using at field in this shot [url]http://imageshack.us/photo/my-images/210/vlcsnap2013011321h48m20.png/[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Jan 13, 2013 7:01 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Sun Jan 13, 2013 7:24 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: Er, okay. The first pic is a long curving line of things moving, as if a conveyor belt. I think I can make out Eva armor on it, or legs, or feet, or something. The second is a panning shot of a great many hands all arranged close to eachother.

[]:             Quote Post by Pyce » Sun Jan 13, 2013 7:44 pm K40s wrote: what about the pic before those two? I though they were a lot of umbilical cable plugs, they are white and have "NERV" written on them.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Sun Jan 13, 2013 7:49 pm Pyce wrote: I'm not really sure what they are, but here SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 13, 2013 8:01 pm Pyce wrote: I'm not really sure what they are, but here

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Sun Jan 13, 2013 8:48 pm Reichu wrote: Nerv staff bicycles.
